purpose: Machine verification that the PUBLISHED beta.2 bundled runtime actually works end-to-end using only bundled binaries (refutes the beta.1 'no runtime -> immediate job failure' mode).

SHA256SUMS.txt.lists: both binaries; hashes match local build AND GitHub asset digests

bundled_runtime_present_in_portable_zip: LecturePack/bin/ggml*.dll (12 files, incl ggml-cpu-*.dll per CPU arch)

frozen_path_resolution.verdict: all three resolvers point at LecturePack/bin — where beta.2 bundles the runtime; consistent

real_media_transcription.tools_used: ONLY app/dist/LecturePack/bin/{ffprobe,ffmpeg,whisper-cli}.exe + app/dist/LecturePack/models/ggml-base.en.bin (the exact packaged onedir that was zipped and published)
real_media_transcription.audio_extraction: bundled ffmpeg -> 16kHz mono pcm_s16le WAV, OK
real_media_transcription.transcription: bundled whisper-cli + bundled base.en model, CPU only (no GPU)

updater_live.note: GUI download->install click-through remains the only human step; logic covered by test_update_service (16) + test_update_integration (6)

human_pending_gates: Clean/new-user install of Setup.exe on a fresh Windows profile/VM
Packaged GUI updater click-through + live beta.1 -> beta.2 in-app upgrade preserving LecturePackData
